title: Alert ‼️ Rent Agreement update #rent #rentagreement #finsaheli
description:
New Rules for Rent Agreement Registration! 📜
Thinking of renting a house soon? Make sure you register your Rent Agreement the right way as per the latest govt norms! ✔️

Steps to register your Rent Agreement:
📝 Draft the agreement together
📲 Get stamp paper or e-stamping done
🏢 Visit Sub-Registrar office or your State’s online portal
✍️ Sign in front of both parties + 2 witnesses
💸 Pay the registration fee — and you’re done!

Documents Required:
📌 ID proof of landlord & tenant
📌 Address proof
📌 Property documents (Sale Deed/Tax Receipt)
📌 Final agreement draft
📌 ID + photos of 2 witnesses

✨ Stay updated. Stay protected.
Save this for later & share with anyone shifting soon! 🔁🏡

#RentAgreement #LegalUpdates #IndianLaw #PropertyAdvice #HomeRental #NewRulesIndia
